mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1B-3A Approved Read-Only Current-State Request Broker

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast, hashlib, json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
drop=root/r"AGENT_FOX_V1B3A"
installed=root/r"System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
expected={"current_state_request_broker_v1.py": [23308, "9ae4812e63d080e533bec97c6fd7d870bea04f96a1eba7ab578bc441a065a676"], "CURRENT_STATE_REQUEST_BROKER_CONTRACT_V1.json": [2936, "fea09eb87c4b08fb4113b5927951eaaeea7a9875fa6cf864c9b0683e0aafcfe4"], "CURRENT_STATE_REQUEST_FIXTURES_V1.json": [11640, "563b262cf33552e1f8cd15a7e81f65eebb7ce1e6777ee6cbe953bead333138e3"], "README_V1B3A.md": [1207, "2ec9647032ffc44269587bf6c4d40035102eb5ced4b0ed2ce6e673d64df1a2a1"]}
for name,(size,digest) in expected.items():
    for base in (drop,installed):
        p=base/name
        data=p.read_bytes()
        assert len(data)==size,(str(p),len(data),size)
        assert hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==digest,str(p)
script=(installed/"current_state_request_broker_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(script,str(installed/"current_state_request_broker_v1.py"),"exec")
tree=ast.parse(script)
imports=set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node,ast.Import):
        imports.update(alias.name.split(".")[0] for alias in node.names)
    elif isinstance(node,ast.ImportFrom) and node.module:
        imports.add(node.module.split(".")[0])
forbidden={"subprocess","socket","urllib","http","requests","psutil","wmi","winreg","ctypes","webbrowser","importlib","multiprocessing","threading","asyncio"}
assert not (imports & forbidden),sorted(imports & forbidden)
for marker in ("Popen(","subprocess.","socket.","urlopen(","requests.","os.system(","shell=True","powershell","cmd.exe","K:\\"):
    assert marker not in script,marker
manifest=root/r"System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\Reference\TECHNICAL_CORE_REFERENCE_MANIFEST.json"
guide=root/r"System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\Reference\TECHNICAL_CORE_REFERENCE_GUIDE.md"
assert hashlib.sha256(manifest.read_bytes()).hexdigest()=="459b1d16af76af323fdd5037af7f044c7accf19db7e40652c3c7a6bb0d883737"
assert hashlib.sha256(guide.read_bytes()).hexdigest()=="d194b5c649e29a06b1b5d2b8438185b35674318d5c5410f1583df59b3782d570"
contract=json.loads((installed/"CURRENT_STATE_REQUEST_BROKER_CONTRACT_V1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract["mission_id"]=="ENG-20260723-022511-401206"
assert contract["scope"]["live_providers_shipped"]==0
assert contract["scope"]["shared_router_modified"] is False
assert contract["scope"]["desktop_modified"] is False
assert contract["scope"]["webui_modified"] is False
assert contract["scope"]["historical_evidence_used_as_current"] is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B3A_EXACT_PAYLOADS_REFERENCE_AND_STATIC_SAFETY_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact V1B-3A payloads, authoritative reference hashes, syntax, and static no-execution safety
Run deterministic in-memory current-state broker fixture suite

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
installed=root/r"System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
contract=json.loads((installed/"CURRENT_STATE_REQUEST_BROKER_CONTRACT_V1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
fixtures=json.loads((installed/"CURRENT_STATE_REQUEST_FIXTURES_V1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract["schema"]=="foxai.agent_fox.current_state_request_broker.contract.v1"
assert contract["mission_id"]=="ENG-20260723-022511-401206"
assert contract["authorization_contract"]["required_mode"]=="read_only"
assert contract["authorization_contract"]["broker_may_self_authorize"] is False
assert contract["provider_contract"]["dynamic_imports_allowed"] is False
assert contract["provider_contract"]["shell_commands_allowed"] is False
assert contract["provider_contract"]["filesystem_discovery_allowed"] is False
assert contract["provider_contract"]["network_allowed"] is False
assert contract["provider_contract"]["user_supplied_provider_selection_allowed"] is False
assert fixtures["fixture_safety"]["in_memory_providers_only"] is True
assert fixtures["fixture_safety"]["live_system_inspection"] is False
assert fixtures["fixture_safety"]["network_access"] is False
assert fixtures["fixture_safety"]["writes"] is False
assert len(fixtures["cases"])==18
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B3A_CONTRACT_AND_FIXTURE_SCOPE_OK")
validations.name: Verify broker contract, zero-provider boundary, and fixture safety declarations

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
snap=root/r"System\EngineeringWorkshop\snapshots\ENG-20260723-022511-401206"
manifests=sorted(snap.glob("snapshot_*.manifest.json"))
assert manifests, str(snap)
manifest=json.loads(manifests[-1].read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
entries=manifest["entries"]
expected=sorted([
 "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/current_state_request_broker_v1.py",
 "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/CURRENT_STATE_REQUEST_BROKER_CONTRACT_V1.json",
 "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/CURRENT_STATE_REQUEST_FIXTURES_V1.json",
 "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/README_V1B3A.md",
])
normalized=sorted(str(row["relative_path"]).replace("\\","/") for row in entries)
assert normalized==expected,(normalized,expected)
assert all(row["existed"] is False and row.get("sha256") is None and row.get("size") is None for row in entries)
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B3A_ADD_ONLY_SNAPSHOT_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact four-file add-only snapshot and no pre-existing targets
